text.title: Django Testing with pytest Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for testing-django-pytest.

conclusion.verdict: function-style unit test; no @pytest.mark.django_db; mock direct collaborators
responses / pytest-httpx; mock only the client adapter
wrap LLM in a checkpoint that surfaces production diffs before edits

text.example: target=db_touching, variants=3 → @pytest.mark.parametrize for amount + currency variants; @pytest.mark.django_db; factory_boy fixtures. Rule: parametrize-over-duplicates.
